detectors.description:
DevReserveVestingVault.claim() (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#146-168) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- amount == 0 (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#159)

DevReserveVestingVault.constructor(address,address,address,address,address,address,uint256)._ledger (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#92) lacks a zero-check on :
		- LEDGER = _ledger (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#101)

DevReserveVestingVault.constructor(address,address,address,address,address,address,uint256)._securityHub (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#91) lacks a zero-check on :
		- SECURITY_HUB = _securityHub (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#100)

DevReserveVestingVault.constructor(address,address,address,address,address,address,uint256)._presale (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#93) lacks a zero-check on :
		- PRESALE = _presale (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#102)

Reentrancy in DevReserveVestingVault.claim() (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#146-168):
	External calls:
	- _syncStart() (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#150)
		- IProofLedger_DV(LEDGER).logSystemEvent(address(this),action,msg.sender) (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#240)
	- vault = beneficiaryVault() (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#152)
		- IVaultHub_DV(VAULT_HUB).ensureVault(BENEFICIARY) (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#128)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- totalClaimed += amount (contracts-min/DevReserveVestingVault.sol#161)
